---
description: "Check the current project state by reading handoff and summary files"
---

Read the latest handoff file in `.github/summaries/` (look for the most recent `handoff-*.md`).

Then report:
1. What was the last session's focus
2. What was accomplished
3. What the next steps are
4. Any open questions or blockers
5. Which files are relevant to load for continuing work

If no handoff exists, list all files in .github/summaries/ and give an overview of the project state based on what's there.
